title: Carney Says Anthropic Ban Shows Risk of Relying on Big AI Models
description: Prime Minister Mark Carney said the US export ban blocking all foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s latest artificial intelligence models underscores the risk of depending on just a handful of powerful AI tools.

title: Apple’s New Siri Is Just Good Enough to Ease Its AI Crisis
description: The company prepares for the foldable iPhone and touch-screen MacBook.

title: Crypto Token’s 50% Wipeout Shows Magnitude of AI-Hacking Threat
description: When Eli Ben-Sasson helped create the Zcash cryptocurrency nearly a decade ago, the cryptographer worried about human adversaries. He didn’t expect that machine intelligence would one day expose a flaw that had eluded years of expert human judgment.
